event_title: Topic Modeling Using Latent Dirichlet Allocation; and Bot Training & Automation
title: Topic Modeling Using Latent Dirichlet Allocation; and Bot Training & Automation
description: Productization of algorithms such as LDA with Fast Data is thoroughly covered at Scale By the Bay, http://scale.bythebay.io . This is a joint meetup with the SF Big Data Science -- we need a venue! There are two talks, LDA by Square and Bots by Bitext.
